summary: Matrix source with clear vocals captures an intense Dew performance despite minor mix imperfections.
review: The reviewer praises the intensity of the April‑15 1969 ‘Dew’ show and highlights that the vocal tracks come through perfectly, even though the overall sound quality isn’t flawless. The recording is a matrix (soundboard‑audience blend) that delivers good clarity but shows some typical imperfections of an older source.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; it praises the performance and vocal clarity while noting sound quality isn’t perfect, leading to a solid but not exceptional overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Vocals are clear and sit well in the mix; overall audio has some imperfections and is not pristine, typical of an older matrix source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer emphasizes overall intensity of the show.
